_comment: Optional one-liner per ticker: why it's a great investment or not. Add symbols as needed. Script falls back to horizon_special 'special' or auto-generated from scores.
NVDA: AI capex cycle leader; high volatility, strong long-term theme.
AAPL: Quality compounder; services growth and capital return.
TSLA: EV adoption play; margins and competition pressure.
SPY: Core equity exposure; low-cost S&P 500 building block.
BTC-USD: Digital store of value; macro and risk-on sentiment.
NEAR-USD: Sharded L1; developer UX; AI/agent narrative.
TAO-USD: Decentralized machine learning subnet marketplace; high beta.
HG=F: Copper: electrification and grid demand; cyclical.
GC=F: Gold: inflation hedge and real rates sensitivity.
FCX: Copper and gold miner; leverage to commodity cycle.
JPM: Quality bank; rates and buyback beneficiary.
META: Ad and AI; engagement and monetization strength.
AMZN: E-commerce and cloud; margin expansion story.
GOOGL: Search and cloud; AI and capital return.
MSFT: Cloud and AI; durable growth and margin.
AMD: Data center and PC; competitive vs NVDA.
NFG: Gold explorer (Quebec); high-grade discovery leverage; pre-production.
NFG.V: Gold explorer (Quebec); Queensway project; high-grade discovery leverage; pre-production.
VNQ: Broad real estate; income and diversification.
